original_image_tags: Back of a document page with two hole-punches at top. Several ink stamps are visible, mostly oriented sideways or upside-down relative to the page orientation. The stamps are layered over faint, reversed text bleeding through from the other side of the page.

elements.description: Three blue ink stamps on the back of a document. Top stamp: 'RECEIVED U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE FBI' dated 'AUG 14 9 34 AM '47'. Middle stamp: 'RECEIVED-D-TAMM U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE FBI' dated 'AUG 14 4 20 PM '47'. Bottom stamp: 'MR. JONES Received F.B.I. AUG 19 9 35 AM '47'.

judge.reason: Description A describes ink stamps generally without quoting text, while Description B provides specific, verbatim quoted text for three distinct stamps including names and dates, indicating hallucination of detailed content not present in A's assessment.
